items.name: Worn Black Beanie
items.description:
Dark, clean and versatile 🖤

This black ribbed beanie is the perfect accessory for emo, goth, streetwear and minimal aesthetic avatars. Simple but powerful, it adds a lowkey edgy vibe to any outfit without trying too hard.

Perfect for soft grunge, sad boy, dark street and minimalist looks. Easy to combine with layered clothing, hoodies and oversized fits.

✨ Works in R6 & R15
✨ Clean dark aesthetic
✨ Matches almost any outfit

Stay mysterious. Stay iconic.

🏷️ Tags:
